case_title: TAK FAI WOO VS. WANG YU YUN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---BONNIE CHOW AND HIS SON CHUNG WOO--INTERPRETER IN TAOISAN. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---ZHI ZHI YE. NO COST AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.
